title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
# Tenders Filter Past Tenders
To

| Notice Inviting Tender for (2nd call) regarding supply of Animal articles in Government managed temples for 1(One) year. | Notice Inviting Tender for (2nd call) regarding supply of Animal articles in Government managed temples for 1(One) year. | 02/07/2026 | 07/07/2026 | |

| Notice Inviting Quotation through e-tender for supplying of Grocery Items, Fruits, Vegetable, Garments, clay article and Dairy Products in Government managed temples up to the period of March 2027. | Notice Inviting Quotation through e-tender for supplying of Grocery Items, Fruits, Vegetable, Garments, clay article and Dairy Products in Government managed temples up to the period of March 2027. | 15/03/2026 | 31/03/2026 | |
